creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
Is your port tree up to date ?
Starting from FreeBSD 14 we ship timerfd.h in base and libepoll-shim is testing this to check if it should package it also or not.

https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/devel/libepoll-shim/Makefile#n18
https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/devel/libepoll-shim/pkg-plist#n8
